mapper.sql: id, user_id, code, vol, cost, price, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into stock_position (id, user_id, code, vol, cost, price, created_time, updated_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
update stock_position
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cost = #{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_position set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cost = #{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_position (id, user_id, code, vol, cost, price, created_time, updated_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete:
delete from stock_position where id in
#{item}
